meaning: adj.商议的,顾问资格的,咨询的
examples: Enviros Consulting has a client base of more than 2,000 organizations worldwide.
Today, consulting or freelancing for five businesses at the same time is a badge of honor.
Provided you have not cheated by consulting an atlas, you will notice something rather surprising.
Mr. HOFFMAN: (As Jon Savage) A friend of mine does some consulting for the Guggenheim Foundation.
Meanwhile, the big leasers, led by tax uberlobbyist Kenneth Kies of Clark Consulting, are fighting back.
